name: logistics fleet coordinators managing 5–15 vehicles tool
description: For logistics fleet coordinators managing 5–15 vehicles, inconsistent maintenance scheduling causes vehicle breakdowns. We automate preventive maintenance notifications instead of manual tracking of maintenance schedules via spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inconsistent maintenance scheduling leading to vehicle breakdowns.
features: simple dashboard for tracking vehicle status
